decks.name: Noun Declensions::Level 1: Masculine -a stems, Nominative & Accusative

cards.back: The men walk on the roads.

decks.name: Noun Declensions::Level 2: Masculine -a stems, Instrumental & Dative

cards.back: I ask the Ven. Nārada this question.
He showed the path of purity to the world.

cards.front: Yathā ca uppannassa satisambojjhaṅgassa bhāvanāya pāripūrī hoti tañca pajānāti. (DN 22)
cards.back: And how (Yathā ca), by the development (bhāvanāya, fem.inst.) of the arisen (uppannassa) enlightenment factor of mindfulness (satisambojjhaṅgassa) it becomes fully developed (pāripūrī hoti), that also (tañca = taṁ + ca) he understands (pajānāti).

cards.front: Aṭṭhi tacena onaddhaṁ, saha vatthebhi (irreg.) sobhati. (MN 82)
cards.back: Bone covered with skin; it looks beautiful with clothes.

cards.front: Saṅgho imaṁ kaṭhinadussaṁ āyasmato Amarassa deti. (Vin. Kd 7)
cards.back: The Community gives this Kaṭhina-cloth to Ven. Amaro.
Thieves run from the village to the mountain.
The boy falls from the tree.
